children.heading: Revisions to Program guidelines
children.label: a Revisions to Program guidelines
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury (in this section referred to as the “Secretary”) shall revise the guidelines for the Home Affordable Modification Program of the Making Home Affordable initiative of the Secretary of the Treasury, authorized under the Emergency Economic Stabilization Act of 2008 () [ et seq.], to provide that the data being collected by the Secretary from each mortgage servicer and lender participating in the Program is made public in accordance with subsection (b).Public Law 110–34312 U.S.C. 5201

children.label: A
children.text: The number of requests for mortgage modifications under the Program that the servicer or lender has received.

children.label: B
children.text: The number of requests for mortgage modifications under the Program that the servicer or lender has processed.

children.label: C
children.text: The number of requests for mortgage modifications under the Program that the servicer or lender has approved.

children.label: D
children.text: The number of requests for mortgage modifications under the Program that the servicer or lender has denied.

children.label: A
children.text: the procedures for disclosing such data to the public; and

children.label: B
children.text: such deletions as the Secretary may determine to be appropriate to protect any privacy interest of any mortgage modification applicant, including the deletion or alteration of the applicant’s name and identification number.
